svg.title: Transformer flow diagram
svg.desc: A vertical flow showing text input tokenized into vectors, passed through stacked transformer blocks (each containing attention and a feed-forward network), producing an output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does raw text get prepared as input to a transformer?')
sendPrompt('How does tokenization work in transformers?')
sendPrompt('How does self-attention work inside a transformer block?')
g.text: Each token attends to every other token

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the feed-forward network do inside a transformer block?')
sendPrompt('What are the final token representations used for?')
sendPrompt('How does the output head turn embeddings into predictions?')
sendPrompt('What does a transformer actually output?')
